description: A UI window pops up, prompting the user to enter data.

input._manualInputKey: A list of valid keys needs to be provided to the UI.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

_moduleUIName: The UI displays this name to the user, and it must be unique throughout the entire flow.
description: check battery level of the device on a specific USB port

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

result_description.0: success, battery level reach target battery level
result_description.1: failure, battery level is not reach target battery level - reach maximum waiting time or reach maximum retry times
result_description.2: failure, no UDID, device may not under normal mode
result_description.3: failure, no SN for android device
result_description.1460: failure, flow set module maximum wait time reached, but device did not reach target battery level

description: Read data from Redis based on the input content, and subsequently jump to the target module to resume execution based on the input conditions.
